name: bankos
description: BankOS — launch a private, compliant, self-custodial stablecoin bank on Arc.

scripts.test: npm run contracts:test && npm run test:unit
scripts.build: npm run contracts:build && npm run abis && npm run -w @bankos/web build
scripts.verify: npm run contracts:test && npm run test:unit && npm run typecheck && npm run -w @bankos/web build
scripts.deploy:local: cd packages/contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:Deploy --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast
